exercises.title: Single Group of 8
exercises.hint: Look at which row pattern repeats across every column. When a variable is 1 in every cell of a group, it must appear in the simplified term.
exercises.explanation: Every minterm where D=1 is included. The K-Map shows two full rows (CD=01 and CD=11, both D=1), forming a group of 8. Only D=1 is common to all 8 cells, so the simplified expression is D.
exercises.groupDesc: One group of 8: all cells where D=1 (rows CD=01 and CD=11)

exercises.title: Single Group of 8 ÔÇö Left Columns
exercises.hint: Which columns of the K-Map are entirely 1? Check what value of A those columns share.
exercises.explanation: All minterms from 0 to 7 have A=0. The K-Map shows the left two columns (AB=00 and AB=01) fully filled. These form a group of 8. Only A=0 is common to all cells, so the simplified expression is A'.
exercises.groupDesc: One group of 8: columns AB=00 and AB=01 (all cells where A=0)

exercises.title: Wrap-Around Group of 8 ÔÇö Even Rows
exercises.hint: K-Maps wrap around ÔÇö the top row (CD=00) and bottom row (CD=10) are adjacent. What do these rows have in common?
exercises.explanation: All even minterms have D=0. The K-Map shows the top row (CD=00) and bottom row (CD=10) fully filled. These wrap to form a group of 8. Only D=0 is common to all cells, so the simplified expression is D'.
exercises.groupDesc: One wrap-around group of 8: rows CD=00 and CD=10 (all cells where D=0)

exercises.title: Single Group of 8 ÔÇö Middle Columns
exercises.hint: Identify the two columns that are entirely filled with 1s. What value of B do those columns share?
exercises.explanation: All minterms with B=1 (columns AB=01 and AB=11) are included. These form a group of 8 in the middle two columns. Only B=1 is common to all cells, so the simplified expression is B.
exercises.groupDesc: One group of 8: columns AB=01 and AB=11 (all cells where B=1)

exercises.title: Single Group of 4 ÔÇö One Full Row
exercises.hint: All four minterms lie in the same row. Identify that row's CD label ÔÇö both variables in the label must be 1.
exercises.explanation: Minterms 3, 7, 11 and 15 all have C=1 and D=1, sitting in row CD=11. This is one group of 4 spanning the whole row. Both C=1 and D=1 are constant, so the simplified expression is C┬ĚD.
exercises.groupDesc: One group of 4: row CD=11 (all cells where C=1 and D=1)

exercises.title: Single Group of 4 ÔÇö Corner Block
exercises.hint: The group occupies the top-left 2├Ś2 block of the K-Map. Look at what two variables are 0 (complement) in every cell of that block.
exercises.explanation: Minterms 0, 1, 4 and 5 occupy a 2├Ś2 block (columns AB=00 and AB=01, rows CD=00 and CD=01). A=0 across both columns, and C=0 across both rows. So the simplified expression is A'┬ĚC'.
exercises.groupDesc: One group of 4: columns AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=00ÔÇô01 (A=0, C=0)

exercises.title: Wrap-Around Group of 8 ÔÇö Outer Columns
exercises.hint: The K-Map wraps around ÔÇö the leftmost column (AB=00) and rightmost column (AB=10) are adjacent. What do they have in common?
exercises.explanation: Minterms 0ÔÇô3 (column AB=00) and 8ÔÇô11 (column AB=10) both have B=0. These two columns wrap around to form a group of 8. Only B=0 is constant across all cells, so the simplified expression is B'.
exercises.groupDesc: One wrap-around group of 8: columns AB=00 and AB=10 (B=0)

exercises.title: Single Group of 4 ÔÇö Centre Block
exercises.hint: All four minterms form a 2├Ś2 block in the middle of the K-Map. Identify the two variables that equal 1 in every cell.
exercises.explanation: Minterms 5, 7, 13 and 15 form a 2├Ś2 block at columns AB=01,11 and rows CD=01,11. Both B=1 and D=1 in every cell. So the simplified expression is B┬ĚD.
exercises.groupDesc: One group of 4: columns AB=01ÔÇô11, rows CD=01ÔÇô11 (B=1, D=1)

exercises.title: Two Groups of 4
exercises.hint: Look for two separate rectangles. One covers 4 cells in the left two columns; another covers 4 cells in the rightmost column. Draw them separately.
exercises.explanation: Group 1: minterms 1,3,5,7 sit in columns AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=01ÔÇô11 (A=0, D=1) Ôćĺ A'┬ĚD. Group 2: minterms 8,9,10,11 fill column AB=10 entirely (A=1, B=0) Ôćĺ A┬ĚB'. Combined: A'D + AB'.
exercises.groupDesc: Group 1 of 4: columns AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=01ÔÇô11 (A'D). Group 2 of 4: column AB=10, all rows (AB')

exercises.title: Two Groups ÔÇö Wrap-Around + Corner
exercises.hint: Identify two separate groups. One wraps around the top and bottom rows (both D=0). The other is in the bottom-right 2├Ś2 corner (both A=1 and C=1).
exercises.explanation: Group 1: minterms 0,2,4,6 sit in columns AB=00ÔÇô01, wrap-around rows CD=00 and CD=10 (A=0, D=0) Ôćĺ A'┬ĚD'. Group 2: minterms 10,11,14,15 sit in columns AB=10ÔÇô11, rows CD=10ÔÇô11 (A=1, C=1) Ôćĺ A┬ĚC. Combined: A'D' + AC.
exercises.groupDesc: Group 1 of 4: columns AB=00ÔÇô01, wrap-around rows CD=00 and CD=10 (A'D'). Group 2 of 4: columns AB=10ÔÇô11, rows CD=10ÔÇô11 (AC)

exercises.title: Two Overlapping Groups
exercises.hint: Two groups of 4 are needed ÔÇö and they share two cells. That overlap is intentional and correct. Draw both groups separately and write a term for each.
exercises.explanation: Group 1: minterms 0,1,4,5 form a 2├Ś2 block (A=0, C=0) in columns AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=00ÔÇô01 Ôćĺ A'┬ĚC'. Group 2: minterms 4,5,6,7 fill column AB=01 entirely (A=0, B=1) Ôćĺ A'┬ĚB. They overlap at m4 and m5 ÔÇö shared cells in overlapping groups are valid. Simplified SOP: A'C' + A'B.
exercises.groupDesc: Group 1 of 4: columns AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=00ÔÇô01 (A'C'). Group 2 of 4: column AB=01, all rows (A'B). Overlap at m4 and m5.

exercises.title: Isolated Cell + Group of 4
exercises.hint: One cell has no neighbouring 1-cells anywhere in the K-Map ÔÇö it cannot be grouped with anything. It must form a group of 1, which gives a 4-variable product term. The remaining four cells form a single group.
exercises.explanation: Minterm 0 (A=0,B=0,C=0,D=0) has no adjacent 1-cells and must be a group of 1, giving the term A'B'C'D'. Minterms 5,7,13,15 form a 2├Ś2 block (B=1, D=1) at columns AB=01,11 and rows CD=01,11 Ôćĺ B┬ĚD. Simplified SOP: A'B'C'D' + B┬ĚD.
exercises.groupDesc: Group of 1: m0 in isolation (A'B'C'D'). Group of 4: columns AB=01ÔÇô11, rows CD=01ÔÇô11 (BD).

exercises.title: Another Isolated Cell
exercises.hint: One cell is completely surrounded by 0s ÔÇö check all its neighbours including the wrap-around edges. It must stand alone as a group of 1. The other four cells form a neat rectangular group.
exercises.explanation: Minterm 2 (A=0,B=0,C=1,D=0) has no adjacent 1-cells ÔÇö its neighbours m0, m3, m6, and m10 are all 0. It forms a group of 1 Ôćĺ A'B'CD'. Minterms 4,5,12,13 form a 2├Ś2 block (B=1, C=0) at columns AB=01,11 and rows CD=00,01 Ôćĺ B┬ĚC'. Simplified SOP: A'B'CD' + BC'.
exercises.groupDesc: Group of 1: m2 in isolation (A'B'CD'). Group of 4: columns AB=01ÔÇô11, rows CD=00ÔÇô01 (BC').

exercises.title: Three Overlapping Groups
exercises.hint: Three separate groups of 4 are all needed ÔÇö each covers one cell that no other group reaches. Notice that m7 appears in all three groups at once, which is perfectly valid.
exercises.explanation: Group 1: minterms 4,5,6,7 fill column AB=01 (A=0, B=1) Ôćĺ A'┬ĚB. Group 2: minterms 2,3,6,7 form a 2├Ś2 block in columns AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=10ÔÇô11 (A=0, C=1) Ôćĺ A'┬ĚC. Group 3: minterms 1,3,5,7 form a 2├Ś2 block in columns AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=01ÔÇô11 (A=0, D=1) Ôćĺ A'┬ĚD. Each group covers at least one unique cell: m4 only in A'B, m2 only in A'C, m1 only in A'D. Minterm 7 appears in all three. Simplified SOP: A'B + A'C + A'D.
exercises.groupDesc: Group 1 of 4: col AB=01, all rows (A'B). Group 2 of 4: cols AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=10ÔÇô11 (A'C). Group 3 of 4: cols AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=01ÔÇô11 (A'D). Overlaps at m3, m5, m6, m7.

exercises.title: Isolated Cell + Wrap-Around Group
exercises.hint: Start by checking every cell's neighbours ÔÇö one is completely surrounded by 0s and must be a group of 1. The remaining four cells form a 2├Ś2 block that needs careful identification.
exercises.explanation: Minterm 6 (A=0,B=1,C=1,D=0) has no adjacent 1-cells ÔÇö its neighbours m4, m7, m2, and m14 are all 0. It forms a group of 1 Ôćĺ A'BCD'. Minterms 9,11,13,15 form a 2├Ś2 block (A=1, D=1) at columns AB=10,11 and rows CD=01,11 Ôćĺ A┬ĚD. Simplified SOP: A'BCD' + AD.
exercises.groupDesc: Group of 1: m6 in isolation (A'BCD'). Group of 4: columns AB=10ÔÇô11, rows CD=01ÔÇô11 (AD).

exercises.title: Double Wrap-Around Group
exercises.hint: One group uses both a column wrap-around (columns AB=00 and AB=10 are adjacent) and a row wrap-around (rows CD=00 and CD=10 are adjacent). Find the two variables constant across all four cells in that group, then look for the second group.
exercises.explanation: Group 1: minterms 0,2,8,10 form a wrap-around square ÔÇö columns AB=00 and AB=10 (wrap) and rows CD=00 and CD=10 (wrap). All have B=0 and D=0 Ôćĺ B'┬ĚD'. Group 2: minterms 2,3,10,11 span columns AB=00 and AB=10 (wrap) across rows CD=10ÔÇô11. All have B=0 and C=1 Ôćĺ B'┬ĚC. They overlap at m2 and m10. Simplified SOP: B'D' + B'C.
exercises.groupDesc: Group 1 of 4: columns AB=00 and AB=10 (wrap), rows CD=00 and CD=10 (wrap) Ôćĺ B'D'. Group 2 of 4: columns AB=00 and AB=10 (wrap), rows CD=10ÔÇô11 Ôćĺ B'C. Overlap at m2 and m10.

exercises.title: Two Disjoint Wrap-Around Groups
exercises.hint: The eight minterms split into two separate groups of 4. One group requires recognising that the outer columns (AB=00 and AB=10) wrap around and the outer rows (CD=00 and CD=10) wrap around. Identify what two variables are 0 across those four cells, then find the matching group for the remaining four.
exercises.explanation: Group 1: minterms 0,2,8,10 ÔÇö columns AB=00 and AB=10 wrap, rows CD=00 and CD=10 wrap. All have B=0, D=0 Ôćĺ B'┬ĚD'. Group 2: minterms 5,7,13,15 ÔÇö columns AB=01,11, rows CD=01,11. All have B=1, D=1 Ôćĺ B┬ĚD. The two groups are disjoint. Simplified SOP: B'D' + BD.
exercises.groupDesc: Group 1 of 4: columns AB=00 and AB=10 (wrap), rows CD=00 and CD=10 (wrap) Ôćĺ B'D'. Group 2 of 4: columns AB=01ÔÇô11, rows CD=01ÔÇô11 Ôćĺ BD.

exercises.title: Overlapping Wrap-Around Groups
exercises.hint: Both groups contain D=1. One group uses the column wrap-around (AB=00 and AB=10 are adjacent). The other is a full row. They overlap at two cells.
exercises.explanation: Group 1: minterms 1,3,9,11 ÔÇö columns AB=00 and AB=10 (wrap), rows CD=01 and CD=11. All have B=0, D=1 Ôćĺ B'┬ĚD. Group 2: minterms 1,5,9,13 ÔÇö row CD=01, all four columns. All have C=0, D=1 Ôćĺ C'┬ĚD. They overlap at m1 and m9. Simplified SOP: B'D + C'D.
exercises.groupDesc: Group 1 of 4: columns AB=00 and AB=10 (wrap), rows CD=01ÔÇô11 Ôćĺ B'D. Group 2 of 4: row CD=01, all columns Ôćĺ C'D. Overlap at m1 and m9.

exercises.title: Three Groups ÔÇö Two Overlapping Pairs
exercises.hint: Three groups are all needed ÔÇö each covers at least one cell that the other two cannot reach. Two pairs of groups overlap: look for a group in the left half, a group in the right half, and a group that bridges the middle columns.
exercises.explanation: Group 1: minterms 4,5,6,7 fill column AB=01 (A=0, B=1) Ôćĺ A'┬ĚB. Group 2: minterms 10,11,14,15 form a 2├Ś2 block at columns AB=10ÔÇô11, rows CD=10ÔÇô11 (A=1, C=1) Ôćĺ A┬ĚC. Group 3: minterms 5,7,13,15 form a 2├Ś2 block at columns AB=01,11 and rows CD=01,11 (B=1, D=1) Ôćĺ B┬ĚD. Overlaps: m5,m7 in A'BÔłęBD; m15 in ACÔłęBD. Each group is essential: m4,m6 only in A'B; m10,m11,m14 only in AC; m13 only in BD. Simplified SOP: A'B + AC + BD.
exercises.groupDesc: Group 1 of 4: col AB=01, all rows Ôćĺ A'B. Group 2 of 4: cols AB=10ÔÇô11, rows CD=10ÔÇô11 Ôćĺ AC. Group 3 of 4: cols AB=01,11, rows CD=01,11 Ôćĺ BD. Overlaps: {m5,m7} and {m15}.

exercises.title: Three Groups with Double Wrap-Around
exercises.hint: Three groups are all needed. One uses both wrap-arounds simultaneously (the outer columns AB=00, AB=10 AND the outer rows CD=00, CD=10 form a valid group). Find that hidden group first ÔÇö it is the key to unlocking the other two.
exercises.explanation: Group 1: minterms 2,3,6,7 ÔÇö columns AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=10ÔÇô11 (A=0, C=1) Ôćĺ A'┬ĚC. Group 2: minterms 8,9,10,11 fill column AB=10 entirely (A=1, B=0) Ôćĺ A┬ĚB'. Group 3: minterms 0,2,8,10 ÔÇö columns AB=00 and AB=10 wrap, rows CD=00 and CD=10 wrap (B=0, D=0) Ôćĺ B'┬ĚD'. Each group is essential: m3,m6,m7 only in A'C; m9,m11 only in AB'; m0 only in B'D'. Overlaps: m2 in A'CÔłęB'D'; m8,m10 in AB'ÔłęB'D'. Simplified SOP: A'C + AB' + B'D'.
exercises.groupDesc: Group 1 of 4: cols AB=00ÔÇô01, rows CD=10ÔÇô11 Ôćĺ A'C. Group 2 of 4: col AB=10, all rows Ôćĺ AB'. Group 3 of 4: cols AB=00 and AB=10 (wrap), rows CD=00 and CD=10 (wrap) Ôćĺ B'D'. Overlaps: {m2} and {m8,m10}.
